google-analytics.desc: Deterministic offline GA4/GTM measurement planning covering event taxonomy, key-event mapping, GTM/Google tag checklists, Consent Mode privacy gates, and DebugView verification with a human-confirmation gate before live tag mutations. [DOC]

google-apis-integration.desc: Multi-service Google API integration planning for Google Sheets API v4, Docs API v1, Calendar API v3, Maps JavaScript API, and YouTube Data API v3 with deterministic offline auth, scope, quota, retry, consent, secrets, operation, and test-matrix checklists. [DOC]

google-calendar-mcp.desc: Safe Google Calendar agenda queries, availability checks, and event create/edit/cancel through local workspace-mcp with least-privilege scope selection, RFC3339/timezone evidence, Google Meet requestId handling, and human confirmation before mutations. [DOC]

google-docs-mcp.desc: Plan and execute Google Docs work via workspace-mcp with least-privilege scopes, title-only documents.create plus documents.get inspection before documents.batchUpdate, and a human-confirmation gate before any create or edit. [DOC]

google-drive-mcp.desc: Google Drive search/list, upload, download/export, folder organization, copy/update, and sharing via workspace-mcp with read-only discovery first, least-privilege scopes, upload-type selection, and human confirmation before mutations. [DOC]

google-maps-integration.desc: Offline plan/checklist for location-aware web apps covering Maps JavaScript API, advanced markers, marker clustering, Places/Geocoding/Directions selection, API key restrictions, accessibility, and privacy with no live API calls or prices. [DOC]

google-sheets-mcp.desc: Compile or execute a Google Sheets MCP plan grounded in the official Sheets REST API with intent classification, minimum spreadsheet-file scopes, ValueRange/batchUpdate operations, read-only-first discovery, and human confirmation before mutations. [DOC]

google-slides-mcp.desc: Plan and execute Google Slides work via workspace-mcp with a read/checklist-first workflow, least-privilege scopes, the five presentations REST operations, ephemeral thumbnail handling, and human confirmation before create or batchUpdate. [DOC]

apis.desc: Cross-service Google Workspace automation planning across Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides with a service matrix, least-privilege OAuth scopes, MCP tool-contract mapping, retry/idempotency policy, secrets policy, and mutation gates. [DOC]

analytics-implementation.desc: GA4 setup. Firebase Analytics custom events. Conversions. User properties. BigQuery export. Looker Studio dashboards. [EXPLICIT]
